---
pagetitle: "Produção Científica e Tecnológica"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "artigos/*.qmd"
    fields: [title, author, date]
    categories: true
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title desc"
      - "author desc"
    sort-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
    filter-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
  - id: patents
    contents: "patentes/*.qmd"
    type: default
    fields: [title, author, date, description]
    field-display-names:
      description: "Registro"
    categories: true
    sort: "date desc"
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
---


# Artigos Originais {#articles}

::: {#articles}
:::

<br>

# Propriedade Intelectual (Patentes e Softwares) {#patents}

::: {#patents}
:::
